title: dryopteris recedens
intro: Dryopteris recedens, also known as Western wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris recedens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
